# llms.txt — AlphaLearn
# Purpose: Help LLMs and AI assistants find authoritative, public pages for citation.
# Canonical: https://alphalearn.ai/
# Last updated: 2026-07-20

Site: AlphaLearn
Domain: https://alphalearn.ai/
Languages: de, en

Summary:
AlphaLearn provides AI-powered tutoring solutions for education providers — including Moodle-integrated AI tutors, self-hosted LLM deployments, and cloud-based learning assistants. Headquartered in Germany, serving DACH and international markets.

---
